title: The National Institute of Fashion Technology Act, 2006
full_text: The National Institute of Fashion Technology Act, 2006 राष्‍ट्रीय फैशन प्रौद्योगिकी संस्‍थानअधिनियम, 2006 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200628 Act Number: 28 Enactment Date: 2006-07-13 Act Year: 2006 Short Title: The National Institute of Fashion Technology Act, 2006 Hindi Title: राष्‍ट्रीय फैशन प्रौद्योगिकी संस्‍थानअधिनियम, 2006 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate the National Institute of Fashion Technology for the promotion and development of education and research in fashion technology and for matters connected therewithand incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Textiles Enforcement Date: 01-04-2007 Notification: 1st April, 2007, vide notification No. S.O. 2159(E), dated 27th December, 2006, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Statutes and Ordinances to be published in the Official Gazette and to be laid before Parliament.
